overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player character moves from a crosswalk past food stalls, under an overpass, and along wet streets reflecting colorful lights from towering skyscrapers and digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with food vendor stall

agents.ego_description: walking across crosswalk toward sidewalk food stall area

notable_agents.action: person in red pants walking across the crosswalk from right to left

entered.detail: red and white striped food vendor stall with yellow umbrella and neon signage
zebra crossing pattern on wet asphalt reflecting neon lights
futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and red warning lights on rooftops
white and red concrete barriers lining the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a neon-lit urban intersection at night, with the camera approaching a red-and-white food stall called 'Craftmont' on the right. The wet asphalt crosswalk reflects the surrounding city lights as pedestrians cross the street, and towering futuristic buildings rise in the background.

events.description: moves from open intersection into covered area beneath concrete overpass

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass alongside concrete barriers

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with red warning lights underneath
metal diamond-pattern security fence running along the right wall
bright white linear lights mounted on the right wall illuminating the path

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a semi-covered walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass, transitioning from the open intersection. Fluorescent tube lights line the chain-link fence wall on the right, casting harsh white illumination on the concrete sidewalk while the food stall disappears behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with security fencing and homeless encampment debris

events.description: speed limit 40 sign comes into view on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking along fenced sidewalk passing pedestrians and street fires

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction as camera

entered.detail: regulatory traffic sign indicating 40 speed limit mounted on pole
metal barrel with open fire burning inside providing warmth and light
low-rise industrial building with rust-colored facade across the street

segments.scene_description: Walking along a fenced sidewalk, the camera passes a speed limit 40 sign and continues past burning trash barrels that cast flickering orange light on the graffiti-covered walls. The chain-link fence runs continuously on the right while an orange industrial building becomes visible across the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with traffic lights and crosswalk

events.description: red van and other vehicles pass through the intersection as pedestrians wait
camera stops at crosswalk waiting for traffic light then begins crossing

agents.ego_description: waiting at crosswalk then crossing the street with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: red van driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: suspended traffic signals showing red lights above the intersection
large multi-level structure with illuminated windows and industrial architecture

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a busy intersection with red traffic lights suspended overhead. After waiting for a red van and other vehicles to pass, the character crosses the wide street alongside other pedestrians, with a massive futuristic building complex rising ahead and the orange industrial building now prominent on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: broad avenue with large digital billboard

events.description: turns right onto new street revealing large illuminated billboard ahead

agents.ego_description: walking down wide avenue toward large digital billboard

entered.detail: massive illuminated advertising screen displaying red and white graphics atop a skyscraper
white concrete barriers lining the left side of the wide street

segments.scene_description: Turning onto a broad avenue, the camera reveals a massive digital billboard glowing red atop a distant skyscraper. The wide street stretches ahead with concrete barricades on the left, while the wet asphalt continues to reflect the neon lights of the towering futuristic cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit futuristic city, moving from a vibrant urban intersection into a gritty underpass before emerging onto a broad, towering avenue. It begins at a wet asphalt crosswalk beside a red-and-white Craftmont food stall, with the camera gliding forward as the open intersection gives way to a semi-covered walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass. As the camera moves deeper into this industrial corridor, the bright city lights are replaced by harsh fluorescent tubes and the flickering orange glow of burning trash barrels against graffiti-covered walls. The scene then opens back up at a busy intersection where the camera waits for traffic to pass before crossing the wide street toward a prominent orange industrial building and a massive futuristic complex. Finally, the camera turns onto a broad avenue, revealing a towering cityscape dominated by a glowing red digital billboard reflecting off the rain-slicked pavement.
